expectations.evidence: Scope line says '~/.claude/skills/ (13 skills, all Claude Code)'. No Codex skills audited.

expectations.text: Applies Claude-specific checks (hooks, config, or data persistence)

All 13 skills have individual sections with X/11 scores, full checklist tables, and top issues
Check #4 'Description Quality' assessed for each skill. 5 skills flagged as weak triggers (oracle, mcporter, orchestrator, new-task, audit-loop)
Check #3 'Progressive Disclosure' assessed for each skill. agent-browser flagged as 632 lines needing split.
